title: Unified cross-dataset benchmark across SiBCS / WRB / USDA — benchmark_unified
code: benchmark_unified(   systems = c("all", "wrb2022", "sibcs", "usda"),   datasets = c("all", "bdsolos", "febr", "kssl", "lucas_esdb"),   paths = NULL,   max_n_per_dataset = NULL,   engine = c("soilkey", "aqp", "both"),   harmonize = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Unified cross-dataset benchmark across SiBCS / WRB / USDA — benchmark_unified
text: systems Character vector. subset c("wrb2022", "sibcs", "usda"). Default "" runs three. datasets Character vector. subset c("bdsolos", "febr", "kssl", "lucas_esdb"). Default "" pools every dataset reference labels requested systems. Datasets without reference labels system silently excluded system's pooled result. paths Named list dataset paths. Element names match datasets. NULL (default), soilKey looks canonical paths "~/soil_data/". max_n_per_dataset Optional integer cap per-dataset sample size (useful development / debugging). NULL (default) classifies every available pedon. engine Currently forwarded Phase-1 aqp wiring. One "soilkey" (default), "aqp", "". "aqp", sets options(soilKey.diagnostic_engine = "aqp") duration benchmark, routes argic() / cambic() canonical aqp::getArgillicBounds / getCambicBounds. harmonize TRUE (default FALSE), applies harmonize_to_gsm dataset's pedons classification, putting chemistry/texture GSM depth grid (0-5 / 5-15 / 15-30 / 30-60 / 60-100 / 100-200 cm). Required cross-dataset pooling integrity (Phase 2.3) slow (~1-2 min 1k pedons) may degrade per-dataset accuracy slightly splined depths approximations. verbose TRUE (default), emits cli progress.

title: Unified cross-dataset benchmark across SiBCS / WRB / USDA — benchmark_unified
text: list elements: per_system – per-system pooled           list(accuracy, n_compared, n_correct, confusion,           per_class). per_system_per_dataset – per-(system, dataset)           shape, breakdown. coverage – per-(system, dataset) sample sizes           label coverage. config – captures systems, datasets,           engine, soilKey_version, timestamp.

title: Unified cross-dataset benchmark across SiBCS / WRB / USDA — benchmark_unified
text: (system, dataset) pair, function: Loads pedons via appropriate load_* helper. Filters pedons populated reference label         requested system. Normalises reference predicted labels via         normalise_febr_*() / KSSL canonicalisation helpers. Calls system's classifier records pred-vs-ref. pools per-system results across datasets.

title: Unified cross-dataset benchmark across SiBCS / WRB / USDA — benchmark_unified
text: datasets morphological data (BDsolos / FEBR), diagnostics pivot Argissolos / Latossolos / Cambissolos classification can run two engines: engine = "soilkey" (default) – hand-coded WRB         6/1.4/20 thresholds. engine = "aqp" – aqp::getArgillicBounds /         getCambicBounds (KST 13ed 3/1.2/8 thresholds). v0.9.62 RJ benchmark (722 perfis), aqp 14.8 pp stricter argic 40.6 pp permissive cambic; SiBCS Argissolos / Latossolos / Cambissolos boundary sensitive . engine currently forwarded future v0.9.63 wired argic() / cambic(); now, benchmark_unified() reports separately per engine engine = "".

title: Carater arenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_arenico
Carater arenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_arenico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_clay_pct Limite superior de % argila para "arenoso" (default 15 = areia / areia franca). min_depth_cm Profundidade minima boundary (default 50). max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima boundary (default 100).

title: Carater arenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_arenico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater arenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_arenico
text: Implementacao: ordena horizontes por top_cm, identifica o PRIMEIRO horizonte com clay_pct >= max_clay_pct, e verifica que () todos os horizontes acima desse boundary sao arenosos (sem camada argilosa intercalada acima) e (b) o boundary (top_cm) cai intervalo [min_depth_cm, max_depth_cm]. Para "espessarenicos" (boundary 100-200 cm), use carater_espessarenico (planejado v0.7.4.B.3).

title: Carater arenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_arenico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5 (Argissolos),             pp 120-138.

title: Carater argiluvico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 6) — carater_argiluvico
text: Solos com B textural (B_textural) em posicao NAO diagnostica para Argissolos, dentro de max_depth_cm. Discrimina os Subgrupos argissolicos de Cambissolos (Cap 6 CX 4.7.8, 4.10.5).

title: Carater argiluvico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 6) — carater_argiluvico
Carater argiluvico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 6) — carater_argiluvico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_depth_cm Default 150 cm.

title: Carater argiluvico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 6) — carater_argiluvico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater argiluvico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 6) — carater_argiluvico
text: Implementacao v0.7.5: requer B_textural passa em alguma camada com top_cm \(<\) max_depth_cm. Distingue-se de Argissolo pleno por contexto: chamado dentro de Cambissolos onde B incipiente (B_incipiente) ja definiu ordem como Cambissolo.

title: Carater argiluvico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 6) — carater_argiluvico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 1; Cap 6, p 153.

title: Carater cambissolico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_cambissolico
text: Solos com B incipiente (B_incipiente) abaixo horizonte hístico (H/O) ou . Discrimina os Subgrupos cambissolicos de Organossolos Folicos (Cap 14, pp 247-248): Folicos Fibricos / Hemicos / Sapricos cambissolicos.

title: Carater cambissolico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_cambissolico
Carater cambissolico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_cambissolico
text: pedon PedonRecord.

title: Carater cambissolico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_cambissolico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater cambissolico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_cambissolico
text: Implementado como uma interseccao de duas condicoes: B_incipiente passa em ao menos um horizonte Esse horizonte B incipiente esta abaixo de um horizonte         H/O (hístico) ou Em pedons sem H/O ou acima B incipiente, o teste falha (B incipiente isolado nao caracteriza Organossolo Cambissolico).

title: Carater cambissolico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_cambissolico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 14, pp 247-248.

title: Carater cambissolico (Argissolos – Cap 5) — carater_cambissolico_arg
text: Solos com 4% ou mais de minerais alteraveis visiveis E/OU 5% ou mais de fragmentos de rocha (coarse_fragments_pct) horizonte B (exclusive BC ou B/C), dentro de max_depth_cm. Discrimina os Subgrupos cambissolicos de Argissolos PA (Cap 5, p 126) – DISTINTO carater_cambissolico (Cap 14 Organossolos Folicos: B incipiente abaixo de histico/).

title: Carater cambissolico (Argissolos – Cap 5) — carater_cambissolico_arg
Carater cambissolico (Argissolos – Cap 5) — carater_cambissolico_arg
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_coarse_pct Default 5% volume. max_depth_cm Default 150 cm.

title: Carater cambissolico (Argissolos – Cap 5) — carater_cambissolico_arg
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater cambissolico (Argissolos – Cap 5) — carater_cambissolico_arg
text: Implementacao v0.7.4 (aproximacao): apenas coarse_fragments_pct \(\ge\) min_coarse_pct (default 5) eh testado. O criterio "minerais alteraveis visiveis" exigiria campo adicional schema (e.g. weatherable_minerals_pct) que sera adicionado em release futura. Documentado como limitacao conhecida.

title: Carater cambissolico (Argissolos – Cap 5) — carater_cambissolico_arg
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5, p 126.

title: Carater carbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33) — carater_carbonatico
text: >= 150 g/kg (15%) de CaCO3 equivalente em qualquer forma de segregacao (incl. nodulos, concrecoes). Excludente: nao satisfaz aos requisitos de horizonte calcico.

title: Carater carbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33) — carater_carbonatico
Carater carbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33) — carater_carbonatico
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_caco3_pct Limite de CaCO3 (default 15%). max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima (top_cm) em que camadas qualificam (default NULL = sem restricao). SiBCS Cap 14 Subgrupos usam max_depth_cm = 150.

what: Carater chernossolico (SiBCS Cap 5; A chernozemico + Ta alta) — carater_chernossolico
title: Carater chernossolico (SiBCS Cap 5; A chernozemico + Ta alta) — carater_chernossolico
text: Solos com horizonte chernozemico (horizonte_A_chernozemico) E atividade da argila \(\ge\) min_ta (default 20 cmolc/kg argila) na maior parte dos primeiros 100 cm B (inclusive BA). Discrimina os Subgrupos chernossolicos de Argissolos (Cap 5: PV, PVA).

title: Carater chernossolico (SiBCS Cap 5; A chernozemico + Ta alta) — carater_chernossolico
Carater chernossolico (SiBCS Cap 5; A chernozemico + Ta alta) — carater_chernossolico
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_ta Threshold de atividade da argila (default 20).

title: Carater chernossolico (SiBCS Cap 5; A chernozemico + Ta alta) — carater_chernossolico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater chernossolico (SiBCS Cap 5; A chernozemico + Ta alta) — carater_chernossolico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5, p 134; Cap 7             (Chernossolos).

title: Carater coeso (SiBCS Cap 1, pp 32-33) — carater_coeso
text: Solos com horizontes coesos: muito duros extremamente duros quando secos, friaveis firmes quando umidos, decorrentes empacotamento das particulas e/ou cimentacao. Discrimina os Grandes Grupos Distrocoesos / Eutrocoesos de Argissolos (Cap 5, pp 117-119) e Latossolos (Cap 10).

title: Carater coeso (SiBCS Cap 1, pp 32-33) — carater_coeso
Carater coeso (SiBCS Cap 1, pp 32-33) — carater_coeso
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima onde camadas qualificam (default 150, conforme SiBCS Cap 5: "dentro de 150 cm partir da superficie").

title: Carater coeso (SiBCS Cap 1, pp 32-33) — carater_coeso
text: DiagnosticResult; passed = TRUE se ao         menos uma camada (com textura suficiente) atende aos dois         criterios de consistencia.

title: Carater coeso (SiBCS Cap 1, pp 32-33) — carater_coeso
text: Criterios canonicos: rupture_resistance \(\\){"hard",         "extremely hard"} (em estado seco) consistence_moist \(\\){"friable", "firm"}         (em estado umido) Excluido: textura areia / areia franca (clay_pct < 15%)

title: Carater coeso (SiBCS Cap 1, pp 32-33) — carater_coeso
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 1, pp 32-33;             Cap 5 (Argissolos), pp 117-119.

title: Carater durico (SiBCS Cap 1) — carater_durico
text: Solos com endurecimento por cimentacao parcial de silica (SiO2), insuficiente para qualificar como horizonte durico (duripa) completo. Detectado quando:

title: Carater durico (SiBCS Cap 1) — carater_durico
Carater durico (SiBCS Cap 1) — carater_durico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima onde camadas qualificam (default 150, conforme SiBCS Cap 5: "dentro de 150 cm").

title: Carater durico (SiBCS Cap 1) — carater_durico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater durico (SiBCS Cap 1) — carater_durico
text: duripan_pct > 0 (presenca de noduros / concrecoes         de silica), cementation_class \(\\){"weakly", "moderately"}         (cimentacao fraca moderada, NAO indurada/strongly). Discrimina os Subgrupos duricos / abrupticos duricos de Argissolos Acinzentados (Cap 5 PAC) e Latossolos com caracter durico (Cap 10).

title: Carater durico (SiBCS Cap 1) — carater_durico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 1; Cap 5 (Argissolos             Acinzentados Distrocoesos abrupticos duricos), p 120.

what: Carater ebanico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 7 e Cap 17) — carater_ebanico
title: Carater ebanico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 7 e Cap 17) — carater_ebanico
text: Cor preta uniforme (value \(\le\) 3 e chroma \(\le\) 2 em umido) em TODO o horizonte B + atividade da argila alta (Ta) + saturacao por bases V% \(\ge\) 65. Discrimina Chernossolos Ebanicos (Cap 7) e Vertissolos Ebanicos (Cap 17) 2o nivel.

title: Carater ebanico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 7 e Cap 17) — carater_ebanico
Carater ebanico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 7 e Cap 17) — carater_ebanico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_value Limite superior de Munsell value em umido (default 3). max_chroma Limite superior de chroma em umido (default 2). min_v Limite inferior de V% (default 65).

title: Carater ebanico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 7 e Cap 17) — carater_ebanico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater ebanico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 7 e Cap 17) — carater_ebanico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 1; Cap 7             (Chernossolos), pp 144-148; Cap 17 (Vertissolos),             pp 271-274.

title: Carater espessarenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_espessarenico
text: Textura arenosa (clay% < max_clay_pct) da superficie ate boundary em [100, 200] cm. Variante "espessa" carater_arenico.

title: Carater espessarenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_espessarenico
Carater espessarenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_espessarenico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_clay_pct Limite superior de % argila (default 15). min_depth_cm Profundidade minima boundary (default 100). max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima boundary (default 200).

title: Carater espessarenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_espessarenico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater espessarenico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_espessarenico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5, pp 130-131.

what: Carater espodico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8) — carater_espodico
title: Carater espodico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8) — carater_espodico
text: Evidencia iluvial de Al / Fe / materia organica em camada de pelo menos 2,5 cm de espessura, em quantidade insuficiente para qualificar como horizonte B espodico (B_espodico), mas suficiente para indicar espodicidade incipiente. Usado em Cambissolos / Argissolos / Plintossolos espodicos (Caps 5, 6 e 16) e em Espodossolos rasos (Cap 8).

title: Carater espodico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8) — carater_espodico
Carater espodico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8) — carater_espodico
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_thickness Espessura minima da camada espodica incipiente em cm (default 2,5). min_oc_pct OC% minimo em camada candidata (default 0,5).

title: Carater espodico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8) — carater_espodico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater espodico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8) — carater_espodico
text: Diferenca para B_espodico: thickness >= 2,5 cm em vez de exigir o gate completo de espessura espodica; OC >= 0,5% em vez gate de iluviacao quantitativa; sinais de iluviacao Fe/Al (al_ox_pct ou fe_ox_pct ou fe_dcb_pct).

title: Carater espodico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8) — carater_espodico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 1, p 35; Cap 8             (Espodossolos), pp 156-160.

what: Carater B espodico profundo (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_espodico_profundo
title: Carater B espodico profundo (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_espodico_profundo
text: Solos com horizonte B espodico cujo top_cm esta entre min_top_cm (default 200) e max_top_cm (default 400). Discrimina os Grandes Grupos Hiperespessos / Hidro-hiperespessos de Espodossolos (Cap 8 1.1, 1.3, 2.1, 2.3, 3.1, 3.3).

title: Carater B espodico profundo (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_espodico_profundo
Carater B espodico profundo (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_espodico_profundo
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_top_cm Default 200. max_top_cm Default 400.

title: Carater B espodico profundo (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_espodico_profundo
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater B espodico profundo (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_espodico_profundo
text: Implementacao: chama carater_espodico e filtra por top_cm intervalo [min_top_cm, max_top_cm].

title: Carater B espodico profundo (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_espodico_profundo
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 8, pp 165-168.

title: Carater eutrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35) — carater_eutrico
text: Distinto de "eutrofico": exige pH(H2O) >= 5.7 conjugado com S (soma de bases) >= 2.0 cmolc/kg solo dentro da secao de controle.

title: Carater eutrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35) — carater_eutrico
Carater eutrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35) — carater_eutrico
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_pH Numeric threshold option (see Details). min_s Numeric threshold option (see Details).

what: Carater ferrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5 e Cap 10) — carater_ferrico
title: Carater ferrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5 e Cap 10) — carater_ferrico
text: Teor de Fe2O3 (pelo ataque sulfurico-NaOH) entre 180 e 360 g/kg de solo (= 18%-36% mass) na maior parte dos primeiros 100 cm horizonte B. Acima de 360 g/kg = "perferrico" (nao implementado aqui). Discrimina os Grandes Grupos Eutroferricos / Distroferricos / Aluminoferricos de Latossolos (Cap 10), Argissolos (Cap 5 Eutroferricos) e Cambissolos (Cap 6 Aluminoferricos).

title: Carater ferrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5 e Cap 10) — carater_ferrico
Carater ferrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5 e Cap 10) — carater_ferrico
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_fe2o3_pct Limite inferior de Fe2O3 sulfurico em % mass (default 18 = 180 g/kg). max_fe2o3_pct Limite superior (exclusivo) em % mass (default 36 = 360 g/kg). max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima de B avaliado (default 100).

title: Carater ferrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5 e Cap 10) — carater_ferrico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater ferrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5 e Cap 10) — carater_ferrico
text: Implementacao v0.7.4: testa se algum horizonte B dentro de max_depth_cm atende ao intervalo. SiBCS estrito ("na maior parte de") seria uma media ponderada por espessura – refinamento planejado para v0.7.5.

title: Carater ferrico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5 e Cap 10) — carater_ferrico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 1, p 35; Cap 5             (Argissolos Eutroferricos, p 118); Cap 10 (Latossolos).

what: Carater fluvico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35-36): camadas estratificadas + distribuicao irregular de C organico. Reuso de fluvic_material (WRB). — carater_fluvico
title: Carater fluvico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 35-36): camadas estratificadas + distribuicao irregular de C organico. Reuso de fluvic_material (WRB). — carater_fluvico

title: Carater gleissolico (SiBCS Cap 5; horizonte_glei em posicao nao-Gleissolo) — carater_gleissolico
text: Solos com horizonte glei (horizonte_glei) em posicao nao diagnostica para Gleissolos (.e., dentro de max_depth_cm mas NAO satisfazendo os requisitos completos de Gleissolo). Discrimina os Subgrupos gleissolicos de Argissolos (Cap 5 PA), Cambissolos (Cap 6) e outros.

title: Carater gleissolico (SiBCS Cap 5; horizonte_glei em posicao nao-Gleissolo) — carater_gleissolico
Carater gleissolico (SiBCS Cap 5; horizonte_glei em posicao nao-Gleissolo) — carater_gleissolico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima onde camadas qualificam (default 150).

title: Carater gleissolico (SiBCS Cap 5; horizonte_glei em posicao nao-Gleissolo) — carater_gleissolico
text: DiagnosticResult.

text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5, p 126; Cap 9             (Gleissolos).

title: Carater hidromorfico (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_hidromorfico
text: Solos saturados com agua em camada(s) dentro de max_depth_cm (default 100 cm), evidenciado por horizonte glei (horizonte_glei) OU caracter redoxico (carater_redoxico) OU horizonte Eg na designation OU acumulacao de Mn em horizonte E ou B espodico. Discrimina os Grandes Grupos Hidromorficos / Hidro-hiperespessos de Espodossolos (Cap 8 1.1, 1.2, 2.1, 2.2, 3.1, 3.2).

title: Carater hidromorfico (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_hidromorfico
Carater hidromorfico (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_hidromorfico

title: Carater hidromorfico (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_hidromorfico
text: Implementacao v0.7.5 (aproximacao): horizonte_glei dentro de max_depth_cm, carater_redoxico ate max_depth_cm, designation pattern Eg dentro de max_depth_cm.

title: Carater hidromorfico (SiBCS Cap 8) — carater_hidromorfico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 8, pp 165-168.

what: Carater hipocarbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33): CaCO3 entre 50 e 150 g/kg. — carater_hipocarbonatico
title: Carater hipocarbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33): CaCO3 entre 50 e 150 g/kg. — carater_hipocarbonatico
text: Carater hipocarbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33): CaCO3 entre 50 e 150 g/kg.

title: Carater hipocarbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33): CaCO3 entre 50 e 150 g/kg. — carater_hipocarbonatico
Carater hipocarbonatico (SiBCS Cap 1, p 33): CaCO3 entre 50 e 150 g/kg. — carater_hipocarbonatico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima em que camadas qualificam (default NULL = sem restricao). SiBCS Cap 14 Subgrupos de Organossolos Haplicos Sapricos usam max_depth_cm = 150.

title: Carater espesso-humico (SiBCS Cap 5, p 119) — carater_humico_espesso
text: Solos com horizonte humico e conteudo de carbono >= min_oc_pct (default 1% = 10 g/kg) extendendo-se ate min_depth_cm (default 80 cm) ou mais de profundidade. Discrimina os Subgrupos "espesso-humicos" de Argissolos Bruno-Acinzentados Ta Aluminicos (Cap 5 PBAC 1.1.2) – camadas humosas espessas tipicas de Argissolos RS.

title: Carater espesso-humico (SiBCS Cap 5, p 119) — carater_humico_espesso
Carater espesso-humico (SiBCS Cap 5, p 119) — carater_humico_espesso
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_oc_pct Limite inferior de OC% nas camadas inferiores (default 1.0 = 10 g/kg). min_depth_cm Profundidade minima de extensao C alto (default 80 cm).

title: Carater espesso-humico (SiBCS Cap 5, p 119) — carater_humico_espesso
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater espesso-humico (SiBCS Cap 5, p 119) — carater_humico_espesso
text: Implementacao: requer (1) horizonte_A_humico passa (2) ha camada com oc_pct >= min_oc_pct cuja bottom_cm >= min_depth_cm.

title: Carater espesso-humico (SiBCS Cap 5, p 119) — carater_humico_espesso
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5 (Argissolos), p 119.

title: Carater latossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_latossolico
text: Solos com horizonte B latossolico (B_latossolico) abaixo horizonte B textural (B_textural), dentro de max_depth_cm (default 150 cm). Discrimina os Subgrupos latossolicos de Argissolos (Cap 5: PAC, PA, PV, PVA) – transicao entre Argissolo e Latossolo dentro mesmo perfil.

title: Carater latossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_latossolico
Carater latossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_latossolico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima B latossolico (default 150).

title: Carater latossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_latossolico
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Carater latossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_latossolico
text: Implementacao: requer (1) B_textural() passa, (2) B_latossolico() passa, e (3) ao menos uma camada com B latossolico tem top_cm maior que o top_cm maximo das camadas com B textural (.e., latossolico ocorre abaixo).

title: Carater latossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_latossolico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5 (Argissolos),             pp 121-138.

Carater leptico (SiBCS Cap 5; contato litico em 50-100 cm) — carater_leptico

title: Carater leptico (SiBCS Cap 5; contato litico em 50-100 cm) — carater_leptico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5, pp 127, 132.

text: Solos com contato litico fragmentario (Cr / Crf) profundidade entre 50 e 100 cm. Discrimina os Subgrupos leptofragmentarios de Argissolos (Cap 5: PA, PV, PVA).

title: Carater leptofragmentario (SiBCS Cap 5; Cr / fragmentary 50-100 cm) — carater_leptofragmentario
Carater leptofragmentario (SiBCS Cap 5; Cr / fragmentary 50-100 cm) — carater_leptofragmentario
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_depth_cm Default 50. max_depth_cm Default 100.

title: Carater nitossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_nitossolico
text: Solos com morfologia (estrutura e cerosidade) semelhante aos Nitossolos, mas diferindo por apresentar relacao textural B/\(>\) 1,5 OU policromia (multiplas matizes Munsell em horizontes B) dentro de max_depth_cm cm. Discrimina os Subgrupos nitossolicos de Argissolos (Cap 5: PV, PVA).

title: Carater nitossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_nitossolico
Carater nitossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_nitossolico
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_b_a_ratio Razao maxima B/para Nitossolos (default 1.5); Argissolos nitossolicos tem ratio > 1.5. max_depth_cm Profundidade maxima B avaliado (default 150).

title: Carater nitossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_nitossolico
text: Implementacao v0.7.4 (aproximacao): cerosidade \(\ge\) comum + moderada, Razao textural B/> max_b_a_ratio (default 1.5),         policromia (\(\ge\) 2 matizes distintos em B).

title: Carater nitossolico (SiBCS Cap 5) — carater_nitossolico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 5, pp 129-131; Cap 13.

what: Carater sombrico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 5 PV) — carater_sombrico
title: Carater sombrico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 5 PV) — carater_sombrico
text: Camada subsuperficial com acumulacao iluvial de materia organica, caracterizada por cores escuras (munsell_value_moist \(\le\) 4, munsell_chroma_moist \(\le\) 3) e oc_pct \(\ge\) 0.5%, em B abaixo de /E. Distinto de B espodico por nao requerer iluviacao Al/Fe. Tipico de solos altitudinais (planaltos sul-brasileiros). Discrimina o Subgrupo sombricos de Argissolos Vermelhos Aluminicos (Cap 5 PV 4.2.6).

title: Carater sombrico (SiBCS Cap 1; Cap 5 PV) — carater_sombrico
code: carater_sombrico(   pedon,   max_value = 4,   max_chroma = 3,   min_oc_pct = 0.5,   max_depth_cm = 150 )

title: Carater terrico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_terrico
text: Solos com horizontes ou camadas constituidos por materiais minerais (horizonte , Ag, Big e/ou Cg), com espessura cumulativa \(\ge\) min_thickness_cm dentro de within_depth_cm da superficie solo. Discrimina os Subgrupos terricos de Organossolos (Cap 14, pp 245-250) e Cambissolos terricos (Cap 6).

title: Carater terrico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_terrico
Carater terrico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_terrico

title: Carater terrico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_terrico
text: DiagnosticResult; passed = TRUE se         soma da espessura dos horizontes minerais (truncada em         within_depth_cm) \(\ge\)         min_thickness_cm.

title: Carater terrico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_terrico
text: Padroes de designacao reconhecidos para horizonte mineral: , Ap, (mineral superficial) Ag (mineral hidromorfico) Big, Bg (B mineral hidromorfico) Cg (C mineral hidromorfico) C, Cr, Crf (mineral subsuperficial) Excluidos somatorio: horizontes histicos (H*, O*) e horizontes cementados puros sem material mineral.

title: Carater terrico (SiBCS Cap 14) — carater_terrico
text: Embrapa (2018), SiBCS 5a ed., Cap 14, p 246             (subgrupos terricos de Organossolos).

title: Cerosidade quantitativa (SiBCS Cap 13, p 207; Cap 1) — cerosidade
text: Diagnostico parametrizado quantidade x intensidade de cerosidade (clay films / cutans). Consume colunas v0.7.2 clay_films_amount (ordinal: /pouca, common/comum, many/abundante, continuous/continua) e clay_films_strength (ordinal: weak/fraca, moderate/moderada, strong/forte; "shiny" mapeado "strong"), introduzidas em substituicao ao legado clay_films.

what: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
text: Given Vis-NIR (MIR) spectrum OSSL reference library enriched WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels, returns K spectrally similar profiles plus probabilistic class prediction aggregated labels.

title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
code: classify_by_spectral_neighbours(   spectrum,   ossl_library,   system = c("wrb2022", "sibcs", "usda"),   k = 25L,   preprocess = "snv+sg1",   region = NULL,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
text: spectrum Numeric vector 1-row matrix (query spectrum). Must align (preprocessing) column space ossl_library$Xr. ossl_library list Xr (numeric matrix, rows = OSSL training profiles, cols = wavelengths) Yr (data frame keyed property; must include column named wrb_rsg / sibcs_ordem / usda_order labels aggregate ). ossl_library may also carry lat lon columns Yr regional filter. system One "wrb2022" (default), "sibcs", "usda". Controls label column Yr aggregated. k Number nearest neighbours (default 25). preprocess Pre-processing pipeline; passed preprocess_spectra. Default "snv+sg1". region Optional list(lat, lon, radius_km) regional filter ossl_library$Yr$lat / lon. verbose Emit cli summary.

title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
text: list three elements: distribution data.table columns           class, n_neighbours, probability           (= n_neighbours / k), sorted probability. neighbours data.table one row per           neighbour (top K), columns rank, distance,           class, plus columns present           ossl_library$Yr. query query metadata (system, k,           region filter, n_library_rows, n_filtered).

title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
text: **spectral analogy** classifier. replace deterministic key classify_wrb2022 / classify_sibcs / classify_usda; instead provides high-prior "expected class" user lab data, reducing search space collecting confirming attributes.

title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
text: default compute distances PLS scores (matching resemble / OSSL recipe), PLS components fit OSSL reference Yr matrix. resemble unavailable, fall back PCA scores stats::prcomp preprocessed Xr – defensible--simpler heuristic.

title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
text: Optional lat / lon / radius_km arguments filter OSSL library profiles within radius_km (great-circle) query location computing distances. implements "biome-aware" use case architecture document calls : Cerrado profile class inferred spectral neighbours Boreal taiga.

title: Classify a soil by spectral similarity to OSSL reference profiles — classify_by_spectral_neighbours
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Toy run against the bundled demo library (synthetic): data(ossl_demo_sa) # Inject a fake label column for the demo (real OSSL has it): ossl_demo_sa$Yr$wrb_rsg <- sample(c("FR", "AC", "LX", "AL"),                                     nrow(ossl_demo_sa$Yr),                                     replace = TRUE) query <- ossl_demo_sa$Xr[1, ] res <- classify_by_spectral_neighbours(query, ossl_demo_sa,                                         k = 10) res$distribution    # ranked classes res$neighbours      # the 10 most similar profiles } # }

what: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
text: Highest-level entry point soilKey VLM pipeline. Given soil-description PDF / profile-wall photograph, function:

title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
code: classify_from_documents(   pdf = NULL,   image = NULL,   fieldsheet = NULL,   pedon = NULL,   provider = "auto",   model = NULL,   systems = c("wrb", "sibcs", "usda"),   report = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
text: pdf Optional path soil-description PDF. image Optional path profile-wall image (JPG / PNG); supplied, Munsell extraction attempted configured provider. fieldsheet Optional path site-metadata field sheet (image PDF). pedon Optional existing PedonRecord; supplied, function fills fields VLM extraction can fill (subject provenance-authority order). provider Either provider name passed vlm_provider (default "ollama") pre-built ellmer chat object (want full control system_prompt, api_key, ...). model Optional model identifier; passed vlm_provider() provider string. Defaults per-provider default default_model. systems Character vector listing classification systems run; subset c("wrb", "sibcs", "usda"). Default: three. report Optional output path self-contained report (.html .pdf). supplied, report called classification results + pedon. Default NULL (report file). overwrite merging extracted values existing pedon, allow VLM-extracted attributes clobber already-recorded ones. Default FALSE – provenance authority order (measured > extracted_vlm) enforced PedonRecord$add_measurement(). verbose Emit cli progress messages. Default TRUE.

title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
text: list elements: pedon (mutated) PedonRecord. classifications Named list three           ClassificationResult objects keyed           wrb, sibcs, usda. report Path rendered report file (          report = ... supplied), else NULL. provider chat-provider object actually used           (useful downstream debugging cost accounting).

title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
text: Constructs vision-language provider chat object via         vlm_provider (defaults local Ollama         Gemma 4 edge institutional independence data         sovereignty). Extracts horizons pdf via         extract_horizons_from_pdf, Munsell colours         image via         extract_munsell_from_photo, site         metadata fieldsheet via         extract_site_from_fieldsheet. Every         extracted attribute stamped source =         "extracted_vlm" PedonRecord's provenance log. Runs three deterministic keys         (classify_wrb2022,         classify_sibcs,         classify_usda). VLM never classifies –         package's architectural invariant preserved. Optionally renders one-pager HTML / PDF report via         report. least one pdf, image fieldsheet must supplied; can also pass existing partially-filled PedonRecord via pedon let function fill gaps.

title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
text: default provider = "ollama" runs entire VLM pipeline user's machine via Gemma 4 (edge variant, ~3 GB, multimodal text+image). part soil description, photograph field sheet ever leaves local network. recommended configuration governmental surveys, indigenous land studies, unpublished research data; also makes pipeline reproducible without internet connection. Cloud providers ("anthropic", "openai", "google") remain one argument away right call.

title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
text: VLM never classifies. Every extracted value carries         source = "extracted_vlm"; deterministic keys         consume resulting PedonRecord unaware         value obtained. Provenance preserved end--end.         evidence_grade         ClassificationResult reflects whether decisive         attributes came measured,         predicted_spectra, extracted_vlm,         inferred_prior, user_assumed –         caller always knows robust classification . Authority order enforced. pre-existing         measured value never silently overwritten         later extracted_vlm value (unless         overwrite = TRUE).

title: Build a fully-classified `PedonRecord` from documents in one call — classify_from_documents
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # The simplest possible end-to-end call -- local Gemma 4 edge. res <- classify_from_documents(   pdf      = "perfil_042_descricao.pdf",   image    = "perfil_042_parede.jpg",   report   = "perfil_042.html" ) res$classifications$wrb$name #> "Geric Ferric Rhodic Chromic Ferralsol (Clayic, Humic, Dystric, Ochric, Rubic)"  # Cloud provider for a one-shot, production run res <- classify_from_documents(   pdf      = "perfil_042_descricao.pdf",   provider = "anthropic" )  # Different Gemma 4 size on Ollama res <- classify_from_documents(   pdf      = "perfil_042_descricao.pdf",   provider = "ollama",   model    = "gemma4:31b" ) } # }

what: Classifica um pedon segundo o SiBCS 5a edicao (1o + 2o + 3o + 4o niveis) — classify_sibcs
title: Classifica um pedon segundo o SiBCS 5a edicao (1o + 2o + 3o + 4o niveis) — classify_sibcs
text: v0.7 ligou 13 ordens; v0.7.1 desce ao 2o nivel (subordens) via run_sibcs_subordem; v0.7.3 desce ao 3o nivel (Grandes Grupos) via run_sibcs_grande_grupo para ordens progressivamente wiradas em inst/rules/sibcs5/grandes-grupos/<ordem>.yaml (Cap 14 Organossolos primeiro). Quando subordem ainda nao tem bloco de Grandes Grupos, ou quando nenhum Grande Grupo passa (e nao ha catch-default), classificacao para 2o nivel.

title: Classifica um pedon segundo o SiBCS 5a edicao (1o + 2o + 3o + 4o niveis) — classify_sibcs
code: classify_sibcs(   pedon,   rules = NULL,   on_missing = c("warn", "silent", "error"),   include_familia = FALSE )

title: Classifica um pedon segundo o SiBCS 5a edicao (1o + 2o + 3o + 4o niveis) — classify_sibcs
text: pedon PedonRecord. rules Conjunto de regras pre-carregado. on_missing Um de "warn" (default), "silent", "error". include_familia Quando TRUE (default FALSE), adiciona o 5o nivel categorico (Familia) via classify_sibcs_familia. O label textual da Familia aparece em $trace$familia_label, e lista de FamilyAttributes em $trace$familia.

title: Classifica um pedon segundo o SiBCS 5a edicao (1o + 2o + 3o + 4o niveis) — classify_sibcs
text: Um ClassificationResult cujo name eh o         nome completo da classe atribuida nivel mais profundo         (Grande Grupo > Subordem > Ordem) e rsg_or_order eh         o nome da ordem (e.g. "Organossolos"). Os codigos de cada         nivel e o trace ficam em $trace.

what: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia
title: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia
text: Aplica dimensoes pertinentes ordem solo e devolve uma lista nomeada de FamilyAttribute. O label textual da Familia eh formado adicionando-se cada value nao-nulo apos designacao 4o nivel, separados por virgulas (Cap 18, p 281).

title: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia
code: classify_sibcs_familia(   pedon,   ordem_code = NULL,   sg_code = NULL,   max_depth_cm = 200 )

title: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia
text: pedon PedonRecord. ordem_code Codigo da ordem (1 letra: "P", "L", ...). Se NULL, sera derivado de sg_code. sg_code Codigo subgrupo 4o nivel (e.g. "PVdAr"). Opcional; usado para ajustes especificos por SG (e.g. forcar subgrupamento textural em arenicos/espessarenicos). max_depth_cm Profundidade da secao de controle (default 200 cm).

title: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia
text: Lista nomeada de FamilyAttribute.

title: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia
text: Esta funcao NAO eh uma chave determinista: cada perfil recebe SIMULTANEAMENTE todos os adjetivos pertinentes (multi-rotulo).

title: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia
text: Implementadas 5 dimensoes – grupamento textural, subgrupamento textural, distribuicao de cascalhos, constituicao esqueletica, tipo de horizonte superficial. Outras dimensoes (prefixos epi/ meso/endo, saturacao de bases, alico, mineralogia, atividade da argila, oxidos de ferro, andico, especificos de Organossolos) adicionadas em sub-commits subsequentes.

title: Classifica um perfil no 5o nivel categorico do SiBCS (Familia) — classify_sibcs_familia

what: Classify a PedonRecord via Embrapa's SmartSolosExpert REST API — classify_via_smartsolos_api
title: Classify a PedonRecord via Embrapa's SmartSolosExpert REST API — classify_via_smartsolos_api
text: Sends soilKey PedonRecord SmartSolosExpert REST endpoint maintained Embrapa (Glauber Vaz's PROLOG-based implementation SiBCS classifier) returns resulting four-level classification (Ordem / Subordem / Grande Grupo / Subgrupo) wrapped soilKey ClassificationResult.

title: Classify a PedonRecord via Embrapa's SmartSolosExpert REST API — classify_via_smartsolos_api
code: classify_via_smartsolos_api(   pedon,   api_key = Sys.getenv("AGROAPI_TOKEN"),   endpoint = c("classification", "verification"),   drenagem = NULL,   reference_sibcs = NULL,   base_url = "https://api.cnptia.embrapa.br/smartsolos/expert/v1",   timeout_seconds = 30,   post_fn = NULL,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Classify a PedonRecord via Embrapa's SmartSolosExpert REST API — classify_via_smartsolos_api
text: pedon PedonRecord. api_key Bearer token. Defaults Sys.getenv("AGROAPI_TOKEN"). Required unless post_fn supplied (test injection). endpoint One "classification" (default; classify ) "verification" (classify + compare user-supplied reference_sibcs). drenagem Optional drainage class. Integer 1..8 Portuguese string ("bem drenado" etc.). reference_sibcs Optional named list (ordem, subordem, gde_grupo, subgrupo) used "verification" endpoint user's reference. base_url Override base URL. Default "https://api.cnptia.embrapa.br/smartsolos/expert/v1". timeout_seconds HTTP timeout (default 30). post_fn Internal: function signature function(payload) -> response_list unit tests. supplied, network bypassed. verbose TRUE (default), emits one-line summary.

title: Classify a PedonRecord via Embrapa's SmartSolosExpert REST API — classify_via_smartsolos_api
text: ClassificationResult         system = "SiBCS 5a edicao (SmartSolosExpert API)"         four taxonomic levels         rsg_or_order (Ordem) qualifiers         (Subordem / GdeGrupo / Subgrupo). Verification-mode         responses additionally carry trace$smartsolos_summary         (per-level match counters L0..L4).

title: Classify a PedonRecord via Embrapa's SmartSolosExpert REST API — classify_via_smartsolos_api
text: **external classifier** – package host replicate PROLOG rules. function exists soilKey users can cross-validate local classifier authoritative Embrapa-hosted reference. Use "verification" endpoint compare user-supplied reference classification (API returns per-level match summary counters L0..L4). Authentication: register free AgroAPI account https://www.agroapi.cnptia.embrapa.br/portal/, subscribe SmartSolosExpert API generate access token. Pass via AGROAPI_TOKEN environment variable api_key argument.

Smart Agricultural Technology, 10, 100735. doi:10.1016/j.atech.2024.100735 . Vaz, G. J., Silva Neto, L. de F. da, Lima, R. N., & Oliveira, S. R. de M. (2019). Uma API para classificacao de solos Brasil. Anais 12 Congresso Brasileiro de Agroinformatica (SBIAGRO 2019), pp. 63-72. Ponta Grossa. Vaz, G. J., Silva Jr, . F., & Silva Neto, L. de F. da (2023). title: Classify a pedon under WRB 2022 — classify_wrb2022

Behaviour trace reports missing attributes. rules Optional pre-loaded rule set.

title: Cryic conditions (WRB 2022) — cryic_conditions
text: Tests whether continuous frozen / permafrost material occurs within upper max_top_cm. Two alternative paths qualify per WRB 2022: Permafrost temperature: layer top_cm <=         max_top_cm (default 100)         permafrost_temp_C <= max_temp_C (default 0 C). Designation pattern: layer top_cm <=         max_top_cm designation containing suffix         "f" (frozen) matching "^Cf" / "perma".         Used fallback temperature field         pedon (typical legacy survey data). Either path qualifies. Diagnostic Cryosols.

title: Default VLM model per provider — default_model
text: Defaults (v0.9.11): anthropic = "claude-sonnet-4-7" – strongest         Claude vision model 2026 cutoff document /         photo extraction. openai = "gpt-4o" – text + vision. google = "gemini-2.0-pro" – successor 1.5         longer context + better multimodal grounding. ollama = "gemma4:e4b" – Gemma 4 edge         multimodal (text + image; audio also). larger         contexts use "gemma4:31b"; cloud-        offload via Ollama, "gemma4-cloud:31b". Pull         desired size first ollama pull gemma4:e4b. Users can override time:
code: vlm_provider("ollama", model = "gemma4:31b") vlm_provider("ollama", model = "gemma3:27b")  # back-compat vlm_provider("ollama", model = "qwen2.5vl:32b")  # any pulled model

title: Pre-2018 SiBCS Order names -> SiBCS 5a edicao plural Title Case map — .SIBCS_LEGACY_ORDER_MAP
text: BDsolos exports collected SiBCS 5a edicao (2018) carry historical Order names modern classifier emit. common cases observed RJ.csv (722 perfis): Podzolicos (54 perfis em RJ) -> Argissolos         (post-2018 Order Argissolos absorveu o Podzolico Vermelho-         Amarelo, Podzolico Vermelho-Escuro, etc.) Gleis      (44 perfis em RJ) -> Gleissolos         (Gleis Humico, Gleis Pouco Humico colapsaram em Gleissolos) Aluviais   (13 perfis em RJ) -> Neossolos         (Solos Aluviais foram reclassificados para Neossolos         Fluvicos SiBCS 5a edicao, mas normalisacao aqui         emite apenas Ordem moderna Neossolos –         Subordem Neossolos Fluvicos nao eh recuperavel         label legado antigo ALUVIAIS (granularidade         de Subordem se perde). Para benchmark Order-level isso e         suficiente; para Subordem o legado nao se mapeia.) Solos      -> NA         ("Solos Halomorficos", "Solos Hidromorficos", e fragmentos         de label UI antigo BDsolos onde Ordem nao foi         registrada). NA aqui significa "fora de scope para         comparacao". Aplicado em normalise_febr_sibcs(level = "order") apos pluralisacao normal. Para subordem o legacy mapping ainda nao e aplicado (ver TODO v0.9.61: estender para Subordem com "Podzolico Vermelho-Amarelo" -> "Argissolos Vermelho-Amarelos").

what: Download the BDsolos consulta-publica CSV (experimental, requires chromote) — download_bdsolos
title: Download the BDsolos consulta-publica CSV (experimental, requires chromote) — download_bdsolos
text: Drives Embrapa BDsolos web form via headless Chrome (chromote) produce CSV profiles + attributes. Marked **experimental**: heavy queries (UF filter) frequently overload Embrapa server. Prefer filter_uf = batches one two states time stitch resulting CSVs.

title: Download the BDsolos consulta-publica CSV (experimental, requires chromote) — download_bdsolos
code: download_bdsolos(   out_path,   accept_terms = FALSE,   filter_uf = NULL,   attributes = "default",   timeout_seconds = 600,   chromote_session = NULL,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Download the BDsolos consulta-publica CSV (experimental, requires chromote) — download_bdsolos
text: out_path File path downloaded CSV. accept_terms Logical. Must TRUE proceed; function aborts otherwise. Documents informed consent BDsolos terms (personal/academic use, ABNT citation). filter_uf Optional 2-letter UF code (e.g. "RJ", "SC"). Strongly recommended – full-table query often times . attributes Character vector. attribute groups request. Defaults full SiBCS-classification-relevant set (Identificacao + Localizacao + Classificacao Pontos de Amostragem, Identificacao + Morfologicas + Fisicas + Quimicas Horizontes; Mineralogicas excluded performance). Pass "" include Mineralogicas. timeout_seconds Total timeout AJAX query. Default 600 (10 min). chromote_session Optional pre-built chromote::ChromoteSession. Useful share session across calls. verbose TRUE (default), prints progress.

title: Download the BDsolos consulta-publica CSV (experimental, requires chromote) — download_bdsolos
text: File path downloaded CSV (invisible).

title: Download the BDsolos consulta-publica CSV (experimental, requires chromote) — download_bdsolos
text: Per Embrapa terms--use, data licensed personal / academic use publications must cite source per ABNT. Set accept_terms = TRUE acknowledge let function click "Concordo" behalf.

title: Download the BDsolos consulta-publica CSV (experimental, requires chromote) — download_bdsolos
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Single UF (fast, recommended) download_bdsolos("soil_data/bdsolos/RJ.csv",                   accept_terms = TRUE,                   filter_uf    = "RJ")  # Stitch multiple UFs for (uf in c("RJ", "SP", "MG", "ES")) {   download_bdsolos(file.path("soil_data/bdsolos",                                paste0(uf, ".csv")),                     accept_terms = TRUE, filter_uf = uf) }  # Then load all of them csvs <- list.files("soil_data/bdsolos", "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE) all_pedons <- unlist(lapply(csvs, load_bdsolos_csv), recursive = FALSE) length(all_pedons) } # }

text: Fetches region-filtered subset Open Soil Spectral Library (Sanderman et al. 2024) assembles `list(Xr, Yr, metadata)` shape consumed predict_ossl_mbl predict_ossl_plsr_local. result cached `tools::R_user_dir("soilKey", "cache")` subsequent calls session (future R sessions) skip network.

title: Download an OSSL subset and return an `ossl_library` artefact — download_ossl_subset
code: download_ossl_subset(   region = c("global", "south_america", "north_america", "europe", "africa", "asia",     "oceania"),   properties = c("clay_pct", "sand_pct", "silt_pct", "cec_cmol", "bs_pct", "ph_h2o",     "oc_pct", "fe_dcb_pct", "caco3_pct"),   wavelengths = 350:2500,   endpoint = NULL,   cache_dir = NULL,   force = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Download an OSSL subset and return an `ossl_library` artefact — download_ossl_subset
text: region One "global", "south_america", "north_america", "europe", "africa", "asia", "oceania". Filters OSSL training rows site coordinates' continent. properties Character vector OSSL property names keep `Yr` (drops reference columns keep artefact small). Defaults WRB-relevant set used fill_from_spectra. wavelengths Integer vector wavelengths (nm) returned Xr matrix interpolated . Defaults Vis-NIR/SWIR (350-2500 nm 1-nm resolution, 2151 columns). endpoint OSSL HTTP endpoint serving JSON manifest; overrideable via options(soilKey.ossl_endpoint = ...) testing using private mirror. default public Soil Spectroscopy GG bucket. cache_dir Cache directory; defaults tools::R_user_dir("soilKey", "cache"). force TRUE, re-fetches even cached subset exists. verbose TRUE, emits `cli` summary fetch.

title: Download an OSSL subset and return an `ossl_library` artefact — download_ossl_subset
text: list elements Xr (numeric matrix, rows =         training profiles, columns = wavelengths nm),         Yr (data.frame requested property columns,         rows aligned Xr), metadata (snapshot         date, region, n profiles, source URL, SHA-256         cache file). Pass ossl_library         argument fill_from_spectra         predict_ossl_mbl.

title: Download an OSSL subset and return an `ossl_library` artefact — download_ossl_subset
text: function intentionally fall back synthetic predictor network failure – missing OSSL artefact real condition caller must handle, silent fallback make benchmarks meaningless.

title: Download an OSSL subset and return an `ossl_library` artefact — download_ossl_subset
text: Sanderman, J., Savage, K., Dangal, S.R.S., Duran, G., Rivard, C., Cardona, M.T., Sandzhieva, ., Aramian, . & Safanelli, J.L. (2024). Soil Spectroscopy Global Good – Open Soil Spectral Library (OSSL). https://soilspectroscopy.org/.

what: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
title: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
text: Fetches region-filtered slice Open Soil Spectral Library via download_ossl_subset post-joins WRB Reference Soil Group labels WoSIS GraphQL spatial nearest-neighbour. resulting artefact canonical list(Xr, Yr, metadata) shape – extra columns Yr: wrb_rsg, wrb_label_source, wrb_label_distance_km, plus optionally sibcs_ordem usda_order translate_systems = TRUE.

title: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
code: download_ossl_subset_with_labels(   region = c("global", "south_america", "north_america", "europe", "africa", "asia",     "oceania"),   max_distance_km = 5,   wosis_endpoint = NULL,   translate_systems = TRUE,   max_to_label = Inf,   verbose = TRUE,   query_fn = NULL,   ... )

title: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
text: region OSSL region filter; one "global", "south_america", "north_america", "europe", "africa", "asia", "oceania". max_distance_km WoSIS spatial-join tolerance kilometres (default 5). Profiles whose nearest WRB-labeled WoSIS neighbour farther left unlabeled. wosis_endpoint Override WoSIS GraphQL endpoint (default getOption("soilKey.wosis_graphql")). canonical value "https://graphql.isric.org/wosis/graphql". translate_systems TRUE (default), also adds sibcs_ordem usda_order columns derived WRB label via Schad (2023) Annex Table 1 / SiBCS 5ª ed. Annex correspondence. translations 1:N classes; pick -common partner tag rows translation genuinely ambiguous. max_to_label Maximum number profiles query WoSIS (default Inf). WoSIS throttles aggressive queries; cap running interactive demos. verbose Emit cli progress messages. query_fn Optional injection per-coordinate WoSIS query function. Default uses .query_nearest_wosis_wrb. Tests pass stub exercise join logic without network. ... Forwarded download_ossl_subset.

title: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
text: list Xr (numeric matrix), Yr (data         frame labels attached), metadata         (list OSSL fetch metadata + join statistics:         number profiles labeled, average / max distance,         WoSIS endpoint, snapshot date).

title: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
text: OSSL stores Vis-NIR / MIR spectra lab data typically lacks WRB Reference Soil Group labels profiles (KSSL data USDA-flavoured; non-US contributions inconsistent). WoSIS, contrast, archives ~228 000 profiles WRB labels spectra. function bridges two user can run classify_by_spectral_neighbours real-data OSSL library without spatial join .

title: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
text: WRB labels obtained via spatial join weak labels. physical location may classified differently across surveys (different WRB editions, different interpretations). row carries: wrb_label_source = "wosis_spatial_join": label         inherited WoSIS neighbour within         max_distance_km. wrb_label_distance_km: distance         neighbour (NA neighbour found within         tolerance). wrb_label_source = "ossl_native": label         already present OSSL Yr (rare; preserved verbatim). wrb_label_source = "missing": neighbour within         tolerance; row stays unlabeled skipped         downstream. Treat labels priors, ground truth.

title: Download an OSSL subset and attach WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels — download_ossl_subset_with_labels
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Real OSSL South-America subset with WRB labels: lib <- download_ossl_subset_with_labels(   region          = "south_america",   max_distance_km = 10 ) table(lib$Yr$wrb_rsg, useNA = "always") table(lib$Yr$wrb_label_source)  # Drop into the spectral analogy classifier: res <- classify_by_spectral_neighbours(   spectrum     = my_query_spectrum,   ossl_library = lib,   k            = 25,   region       = list(lat = -22.7, lon = -43.7,                       radius_km = 500) ) } # }

title: Extract horizons from a soil description PDF — extract_horizons_from_pdf
text: Reads PDF (typically soil survey chapter, field-sheet scan, thesis appendix), prompts configured VLM extract horizon attributes inst/schemas/horizon.json, merges result pedon. Every extracted attribute recorded source = "extracted_vlm" model's reported confidence verbatim source quote.

title: Extract horizons from a soil description PDF — extract_horizons_from_pdf
code: extract_horizons_from_pdf(   pedon,   pdf_path = NULL,   provider,   max_retries = 3L,   overwrite = FALSE,   prompt_name = "extract_horizons",   schema_name = "horizon",   pdf_text = NULL )

title: Extract horizons from a soil description PDF — extract_horizons_from_pdf
text: pedon PedonRecord merge . Mutated place returned invisibly. pdf_path Path PDF file. Either pdf_path pdf_text must supplied. provider chat provider vlm_provider (MockVLMProvider testing). max_retries Integer; many times re-prompt validation failure. Default 3. overwrite TRUE, lower-authority values allowed clobber higher-authority ones. Default FALSE. prompt_name Override default prompt template ("extract_horizons"). schema_name Override default schema ("horizon"). pdf_text Optional alternative pdf_path: already-extracted description text. Useful smoke tests, unit tests without pdftools, already-OCR'd field-sheet text.

title: Extract horizons from a soil description PDF — extract_horizons_from_pdf
text: Invisibly, (mutated) pedon. Carries         "vlm_extraction" attribute parsed response,         number attempts, number provenance entries added.

title: Extract horizons from a soil description PDF — extract_horizons_from_pdf
text: PedonRecord's authority order guarantees values already tagged "measured" never silently overwritten VLM extraction unless overwrite = TRUE. PDF long (~30,000 characters), chunked page--page page sent independently. conservative--simple strategy; long surveys callers pre-chunk call function per profile.

title: Extract horizons from a soil description PDF — extract_horizons_from_pdf

title: Familia: mineralogia da fracao areia (Cap 18, p 286) — familia_mineralogia_areia

title: Familia: mineralogia da fracao areia (Cap 18, p 286) — familia_mineralogia_areia
text: Quando os percentuais especificos estao ausentes, busca coluna sand_mineralogy (atalho qualitativo, valores aceitos: "micacea", "anfibolitica", "feldspatica"). Aplicavel Cambissolos, Chernossolos, Gleissolos, Luvissolos, Neossolos (excepto Quartzarenicos), Nitossolos, Planossolos, Plintossolos e Vertissolos.

what: Familia: mineralogia da fracao argila (geral, nao-Latossolos) — familia_mineralogia_argila_geral
title: Familia: mineralogia da fracao argila (geral, nao-Latossolos) — familia_mineralogia_argila_geral
text: Classifica mineralogia da argila para Argissolos, Cambissolos, Plintossolos, Luvissolos, Nitossolos, Vertissolos, Chernossolos, Planossolos, Gleissolos quando ha informacao quantitativa de atividade da argila e/ou Ki/Kr. Cobre classes nao endereçadas por familia_mineralogia_argila_latossolo: esmectitica: T_argila >= ta_threshold (default         27 cmolc/kg argila), indicando dominancia de argilas 2:1         expansivas (esmectita / vermiculita / micas hidratadas). caulinitica: Ki >= ki_caulinitico_min (default         0.75) e Kr >= kr_caulinitico_min (default 0.75),         alem de T_argila < ta_threshold. oxidica: Kr < kr_caulinitico_min, indicando         predominancia de oxihidrooxidos de Fe e Al. mista: nenhum dos outros gates fechou         conclusivamente – evidencia heterogenea ou incompleta. Quando os tres atributos (T_argila, Ki, Kr) estiverem ausentes, o resultado fica NULL e os atributos faltantes sao reportados.

title: Familia: mineralogia da fracao argila (geral, nao-Latossolos) — familia_mineralogia_argila_geral
code: familia_mineralogia_argila_geral(   pedon,   max_depth_cm = 200,   ta_threshold = 27,   ki_caulinitico_min = 0.75,   kr_caulinitico_min = 0.75 )

what: Familia: mineralogia da fracao argila para Latossolos (Cap 18, p 286-287) — familia_mineralogia_argila_latossolo
title: Familia: mineralogia da fracao argila para Latossolos (Cap 18, p 286-287) — familia_mineralogia_argila_latossolo
text: Classifica via Ki = SiO2/(Al2O3) e Kr = SiO2/(Al2O3 + Fe2O3) molares (helpers compute_ki / compute_kr): caulinitico: Ki > 0.75 e Kr > 0.75 caulinitico-oxidico: Ki > 0.75 e Kr <= 0.75 gibsitico-oxidico: Ki <= 0.75 e Kr <= 0.75 oxidico: Kr <= 0.75 (predominio Fe2O3 + Al2O3)

title: Familia: saturacao por aluminio –
text: Aplica o termo "alico" quando, em qualquer camada horizonte B (ou C, na ausencia de B): al_sat_pct >= 50% (saturacao por Al = 100*Al/(S+Al)), E al_cmol > 0.5 cmolc/kg. Quando aplicavel, o prefixo de profundidade (epi-/meso-/endo-) eh determinado pelo topo da primeira camada que satisfaz, e concatenado ao adjetivo: "epialico", "mesoalico", "endoalico".

title: Familia: saturacao por aluminio –
Familia: saturacao por aluminio –

title: Ferralic horizon (WRB 2022) — ferralic
text: Tests whether horizon meets ferralic horizon criteria. ferralic horizon subsurface horizon resulting long intense weathering, characterized low cation exchange capacity per unit clay – canonical "low-activity clay" signal defines Ferralsol RSG.

title: Ferralic horizon (WRB 2022) — ferralic
code: ferralic(pedon, min_thickness = 30, max_cec = NULL, engine = NULL)

title: Ferralic horizon (WRB 2022) — ferralic
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_thickness Minimum thickness cm (default 30). max_cec Maximum CEC (1M NH4OAc, pH 7) per kg clay (default NULL = 16 soilkey engine, 20 aqp engine; see engine). engine One "soilkey" (default; strict 16 cmol_c/kg-clay threshold per WRB 2022) "aqp" (relaxed 20 cmol_c/kg-clay – regional tolerance accommodates Brazilian / SOTERLAC Latossolos data, Embrapa-style Mehlich/Ca+Mg+K+Al sum often reads ~17-20 profiles canonical NRCS / WRB definition accept ferralic). NULL reads getOption("soilKey.diagnostic_engine"). numeric threshold can also overridden directly via options(soilKey.ferralic_max_cec = ...).

title: Ferralic horizon (WRB 2022) — ferralic
text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Ferralic horizon (WRB 2022) — ferralic
text: Sub-tests called: test_ferralic_texture – texture sandy loam         finer. test_cec_per_clay – CEC / clay <= 16 (20         engine = "aqp") cmol_c/kg clay. test_ferralic_thickness – thickness >= 30 cm. v0.3.1 alignment WRB 2022 Ch 3.1.10 (p. 44): older "ECEC <= 12 cmol_c/kg clay" gate removed canonical text – CEC (1M NH4OAc, pH 7) <= 16 required. v0.9.67 regional tolerance: BDsolos RJ benchmark (n=722 perfis) showed 88/115 Latossolos failing strict 16-cmol gate Embrapa lab methodology often reads CEC 17-20 profiles unambiguously Latossolos every criterion. engine = "aqp" threshold 20 closes gap without redefining WRB threshold ; users targeting strict WRB 2022 fidelity keep engine = "soilkey". weatherable-mineral test (<= 10% volume), water-dispersible-clay test, stratification / rock-structure exclusions remain deferred (need mineralogical data outside canonical horizon schema) refinements rather gates.

title: Ferralic horizon (WRB 2022) — ferralic
text: IUSS Working Group WRB (2022). World Reference Base Soil Resources, 4th edition. International Union Soil Sciences, Vienna. Chapter 3.1.10 – Ferralic horizon (p. 44).

what: Ferralsol RSG gate (WRB 2022 Ch 4, p 110) — ferralsol
title: Ferralsol RSG gate (WRB 2022 Ch 4, p 110) — ferralsol
text: WRB-canonical: ferralic horizon \<= 150 cm argic horizon starting (upper limit ) ferralic, UNLESS argic upper 30 cm throughout one : < 10% water-dispersible clay; DeltapH (pH_KCl - pH_water) \>= 0; \>= 1.4% soil organic carbon. v0.3.4 enforces three exception paths. DeltapH check uses ph_kcl ph_h2o; WDC check uses water_dispersible_clay_pct (introduced v0.3.3 schema).

what: Fill missing soil attributes from spectra via OSSL — fill_from_spectra
title: Fill missing soil attributes from spectra via OSSL — fill_from_spectra
text: Given PedonRecord carrying spectra$vnir matrix (rows = horizons, columns = wavelengths nm), pre-processes spectra, predicts requested soil properties using chosen OSSL-backed method, writes predictions pedon's horizons table via pedon$add_measurement(..., source = "predicted_spectra"). call updates pedon's provenance log downstream classification can derive evidence grade.

title: Fill missing soil attributes from spectra via OSSL — fill_from_spectra
code: fill_from_spectra(   pedon,   library = "ossl",   region = c("global", "south_america", "north_america", "europe", "africa"),   properties = c("clay_pct", "sand_pct", "silt_pct", "cec_cmol", "bs_pct", "ph_h2o",     "oc_pct", "fe_dcb_pct", "caco3_pct"),   method = c("mbl", "plsr_local", "pretrained"),   preprocess = "snv+sg1",   k_neighbors = 100L,   overwrite = FALSE,   ossl_library = NULL,   ossl_models = NULL,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Fill missing soil attributes from spectra via OSSL — fill_from_spectra
text: pedon PedonRecord spectra$vnir matrix. library Currently "ossl" supported. region One "global", "south_america", "north_america", "europe", "africa". Used subset OSSL training data supported underlying backend. properties Character vector OSSL-supported property names predict. Default covers -requested WRB/SiBCS-relevant attributes. method One "mbl", "plsr_local", "pretrained". preprocess Pre-processing pipeline; passed preprocess_spectra. k_neighbors Number neighbours memory-based methods. overwrite FALSE (default), fill cells whose existing provenance weaker predicted_spectra. ossl_library Optional OSSL library object (see predict_ossl_mbl). ossl_models Optional named list pretrained models (see predict_ossl_pretrained). verbose TRUE, prints cli summary.

title: Fill missing soil attributes from spectra via OSSL — fill_from_spectra
text: mutated pedon, invisibly. Provenance entries         source = "predicted_spectra" added per         (horizon, property).

title: Fill missing soil attributes from spectra via OSSL — fill_from_spectra
text: default, predicted values overwrite measured values (add_measurement() authority logic protects ). Setting overwrite = TRUE forces overwrite non-measured value.

text: DiagnosticResult.

title: Gleyic properties (WRB 2022) — gleyic_properties
text: Sub-test: test_gleyic_features – requires explicit redoximorphic_features_pct >= 5% within upper 50 cm. v0.2 deliberately use Munsell-based shortcut (chroma <= 2 + value >= 4) primary criterion: pattern fits albic / bleached horizons Podzols just well truly reduced gleyic horizons. v0.3 add reductimorphic / oxidimorphic feature discrimination model field-described mottle properties. v0.9.72 adds designation-suffix path (opt-).

title: Gleyic properties (WRB 2022) — gleyic_properties
text: Field-described Brazilian Gleissolos profiles (e.g.\ Embrapa Redape curated dataset) routinely encode gleyic properties via designation suffix g (e.g.\ Cg, Cg1, Cgn, Apg) plus low-chroma Munsell colours (chroma \<= 2), without recording redoximorphic_features_pct numeric percent. strict canonical test returns NA every horizon Gleissolos cascade Orders. options(soilKey.gleyic_designation_inference = TRUE) function accepts layer gleyic : canonical redoximorphic_features_pct test         NA layer, designation matches [-Z]+g[0-9a-z]? (horizon         name g suffix master letter sequence,         e.g.\ Cg, Bg2, Apg, Cgn), layer munsell_chroma_moist <= 2 (low-chroma         reduced colour) Munsell recorded; Munsell         missing layer suffix alone sufficient         (designation suffix direct signal pedologist         field judgment). conservative: suffix g master-letter modifier FAO/Embrapa horizon nomenclature explicitly means "gleyic-affected" – curator already made call. Default FALSE (canonical behaviour preserved).

title: Gleyic properties (WRB 2022) — gleyic_properties
text: IUSS Working Group WRB (2022), Chapter 3, Gleyic properties.

Path 2 deferred (requires depth-- saturation column standard).

what: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
title: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
text: Runs mpspline2::mpspline_tidy() requested numeric horizon attribute, producing new PedonRecord per input pedon whose horizons table covers canonical GSM intervals (GSM_DEPTHS). Categorical attributes (designation, Munsell hue) propagated mode--depth-overlap.

title: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
code: harmonize_to_gsm(   pedons,   attributes = c("clay_pct", "silt_pct", "sand_pct", "ph_h2o", "oc_pct", "cec_cmol",     "base_saturation_pct", "munsell_value_moist", "munsell_chroma_moist",     "redoximorphic_features_pct"),   depths = GSM_DEPTHS,   lam = 0.1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
text: pedons list PedonRecord objects. attributes Character vector numeric horizon column names harmonise. Default covers chemistry / texture / Munsell numeric columns soilKey diagnostics use. depths Numeric vector GSM depth boundaries (n+1 values n intervals). Default GSM_DEPTHS. lam Smoothing parameter spline (default 0.1, per Bishop et al. 1999 recommendation). verbose TRUE (default), emits cli progress.

title: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
text: list new PedonRecord objects   harmonised horizons.

title: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
text: Bishop et al. (1999) spline conserves integral attribute depth: original pedon 30 g/kg OC 0-15 cm, harmonised pedon report 30 g/kg integrated 0-15 cm (split 0-5 5-15 proportion spline-implied gradient). critical property benchmark integrity: simple linear interpolation preserve mass biases means upward / downward systematically.

title: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
text: designation munsell_hue_moist (character columns horizon schema) splined. Instead, target GSM interval, pick modal value weighted depth-overlap fraction input horizons. Ties broken uppermost-input-horizon precedence.

title: Harmonise pedons to GlobalSoilMap depth intervals — harmonize_to_gsm
text: Bishop, T.F.., McBratney, .B., Laslett, G.M. (1999). "Modelling soil attribute depth functions equal-area quadratic smoothing splines." Geoderma 91: 27-45. Arrouays, D. et al. (2014). "GlobalSoilMap: Toward fine-resolution global grid soil properties." Advances Agronomy 125: 93-134.

title: Histic epipedon (USDA Soil Taxonomy, 13th edition) — histic_epipedon_usda
text: KST 13ed required characteristics (Ch. 3, pp 13-15): Saturated 30+ days/year (artificially drained); Organic soil material either: 20-60 cm thick (Sphagnum >= 75 percent             bulk_density < 0.1 g/cm3); 20-40 cm thick (general); Ap horizon mixed 25 cm OC >= 8 percent weight. Implementation notes (v0.8.x): Saturation detected via horizon designation         starting H (per KST notation) via WRB         horizonte_glei fallback redoximorphic         features present. Sphagnum content uses WRB fiber_content_rubbed_pct         column (>= 75 means fibrous); refinement true         Sphagnum-specific column deferred.

title: Histic epipedon (USDA Soil Taxonomy, 13th edition) — histic_epipedon_usda
text: Soil Survey Staff (2022). Keys Soil Taxonomy,   13th edition, USDA-NRCS, Washington DC. Ch. 3, pp. 13-15.

title: Histic horizon (WRB 2022) — histic_horizon
text: surface (near-surface, drainage) horizon organic material; diagnostic Histosols. Two alternative qualifying paths per WRB 2022: Contiguous: single layer organic material         (OC % >= min_oc) reaching surface         least min_thickness cm thick (default 10 cm). Cumulative: organic material totalling         cumulative_min_cm cm (default 40) within upper         cumulative_max_depth_cm (default 80). Relevant         folic / mossy Histosols slopes. Either path qualifies. "drainage" qualifier (recently drained organic soils) treated implicit since OC thickness criteria apply.

title: Histic horizon (WRB 2022) — histic_horizon
code: histic_horizon(   pedon,   min_thickness = 10,   min_oc = 12,   surface_top_cm = 0,   cumulative_min_cm = 40,   cumulative_max_depth_cm = 80 )

title: Histic horizon (WRB 2022) — histic_horizon
text: pedon PedonRecord. min_thickness Minimum thickness (cm) contiguous path (default 10). min_oc Minimum organic carbon % (default 12, WRB 2022; equivalent >= 20% organic matter). surface_top_cm Maximum top depth (cm) layer considered "surface-related" contiguous path (default 0). cumulative_min_cm Minimum cumulative thickness (cm) cumulative path (default 40). cumulative_max_depth_cm Depth window (cm) cumulative path (default 80).

title: Leptic features (WRB 2022) — leptic_features
text: Tests whether continuous rock rock-like material occurs within max_depth cm surface. Two alternative paths qualify per WRB 2022: Designation: layer depth <= max_depth         designation matching "^R" "^Cr"         (continuous rock weathered rock-like substrate). Coarse fragments: layer depth <= max_depth         coarse_fragments_pct >= min_coarse_pct (default         90% volume), interpreted rock-dominated even         R / Cr-designated. Either path qualifies.

title: Leptic features (WRB 2022) — leptic_features
code: leptic_features(pedon, max_depth = 25, min_coarse_pct = NULL, engine = NULL)

title: Leptic features (WRB 2022) — leptic_features
text: pedon PedonRecord. max_depth Maximum depth (cm) continuous rock rock-dominated material must appear (default 25). min_coarse_pct Minimum coarse-fragment percent coarse-fragments path (default 90 soilkey engine, 50 aqp engine; NULL picks default per engine). engine One "soilkey" (default; strict 90\ cfvo threshold) "aqp" (LUCAS-friendly relaxed 50\ requiring positive evidence rock contact – v0.9.66 tightening). thin-topsoil path fires horizon ending within max_depth also satisfies least one : () designation contains "R" (e.g.\ AR, BR, Cr, R, Rk), (b) coarse_fragments_pct >= 30 (gravelly), (c) deeper horizon R/Cr-designated. Users strong external prior (e.g.\ parent-material survey documents rock < 25 cm record horizon table) can opt back original v0.9.65 loose behaviour options(soilKey.leptic_assume_rock_below = TRUE). NULL (default) reads getOption("soilKey.diagnostic_engine").

Default NULL (countries). max_n Optional integer cap number pedons returned (country filter). Useful development. verbose TRUE (default), prints summary line.

text: list PedonRecord objects (one per LUCAS         point). pedon site$id matching LUCAS         POINTID, site$lat / site$lon WGS84,         either one two horizons (second 20-30 cm         subsoil OC / CaCO3 columns populated).         Provenance entries loader use         source = "measured".

title: Load the LUCAS Soil 2018 Topsoil release as a list of PedonRecord objects — load_lucas_soil_2018
text: release (fill ): Texture (clay / sand / silt) – CSV.         Pass benchmark_lucas_2018(..., fill_texture_from =         "soilgrids") fill ISRIC SoilGrids 250m via         lookup_soilgrids. Munsell colors – collected LUCAS Soil 2018.         user Vis-NIR spectra (release separate ~83 GB),         use predict_munsell_from_spectra (v0.9.47). Vis-NIR spectra – distributed separately ESDAC.         downloaded attached pedon's $spectra,         predict_from_spectra (v0.9.46) fills clay /         sand / silt / pH / OC / CEC. Taxonomic reference – LUCAS release;         benchmark_lucas_2018 attaches canonical         WRB Reference Soil Group via lookup_esdb         (v0.9.44) pedon's coordinates. Unit conversions applied (LUCAS -> soilKey schema): OC, N, CaCO3, Ox_Al, Ox_Fe: g/kg -> EC: mS/m -> dS/m (* 0.01) P, K: mg/kg unchanged pH: unitless Special LUCAS string values "< LOD", "<LOD", empty cells "n.d." / "ND" converted NA numeric coercion.

title: Load the LUCAS Soil 2018 Topsoil release as a list of PedonRecord objects — load_lucas_soil_2018

First-ever benchmark sample (soilKey v0.9.73, full v0.9.69-72 fallback stack): Overall top-1 accuracy: 16.2\ Histosol 100\         20\         Cambisol 60\ 18 RSGs 0\         expose (Munsell colours, base saturation, sodium         Solonetz, slickensides Vertisols, etc.). Documented         data ceiling. live API, call run_wosis_benchmark_graphql() read_wosis_profiles_graphql(wrb_rsg = "...", n_max = N) helper (small RSG-filtered queries tractable; large unfiltered pulls time 2026-05).

what: Look up an ESDB raster value at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_esdb
title: Look up an ESDB raster value at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_esdb
text: Loads requested attribute raster, reprojects WGS84 lat/lon input raster's native CRS (typically LAEA Europe, EPSG:3035), extracts value(s). Value Attribute Table (`.vat.dbf`) available, integer raster value decoded coded string (e.g. `21` -> `"LV"` -> Luvisol).

title: Look up an ESDB raster value at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_esdb
Look up an ESDB raster value at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_esdb
text: coords two-column matrix data.frame `lon` `lat` (WGS84 decimal degrees) – order. single c(lon, lat) vector also accepted. attribute Name ESDB attribute folder, e.g. "WRBLV1" "WRBFU". See available_esdb_attributes. raster_root Path unpacked ESDB raster directory. decode TRUE (default), decode integer raster value VAT-coded string (e.g. "21" -> "LV"). FALSE, return raw integer.

title: Look up an ESDB raster value at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_esdb
text: Character vector (decoded codes) numeric vector (raw         values) length nrow(coords).         NA points outside raster footprint.

title: Look up an ESDB raster value at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_esdb
text: Coordinates outside European raster footprint return `NA` silently (rather erroring) vectorised calls degrade gracefully.

title: Look up an ESDB raster value at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_esdb
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ root <- "~/data/ESDB-Raster-Library-1k-GeoTIFF-20240507"  # Single point: Wageningen, Netherlands (5.66 E, 51.97 N) lookup_esdb(c(5.66, 51.97), "WRBLV1", root) #> [1] "GL"   # Gleysol per the ESDB 1km raster  # Vector: Lisbon + Berlin + Helsinki coords <- rbind(c(-9.14, 38.72), c(13.40, 52.52), c(24.94, 60.17)) lookup_esdb(coords, "WRBLV1", root) #> [1] "CM" "LV" "PZ"   # Cambisol, Luvisol, Podzol } # }

what: Look up a SoilGrids 250m soil property at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_soilgrids
title: Look up a SoilGrids 250m soil property at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_soilgrids
text: Reads ISRIC SoilGrids 250m (Hengl et al. 2017, 2021) directly ISRIC Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (COG) endpoint https://files.isric.org/soilgrids/latest/data/ – download required, pixel query coordinate transferred HTTPS.

title: Look up a SoilGrids 250m soil property at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_soilgrids
code: lookup_soilgrids(   coords,   property = c("clay", "sand", "silt", "phh2o", "soc", "cec", "bdod", "nitrogen", "ocd",     "ocs", "cfvo"),   depth = c("0-5cm", "5-15cm", "15-30cm", "30-60cm", "60-100cm", "100-200cm"),   quantile = c("mean", "Q0.05", "Q0.5", "Q0.95", "uncertainty"),   baseurl = "https://files.isric.org/soilgrids/latest/data",   raw = FALSE )

title: Look up a SoilGrids 250m soil property at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_soilgrids
text: coords 2-column matrix data.frame lon, lat (WGS84 decimal degrees), length-2 numeric vector single query. property One SoilGrids 250m predicted properties: "clay", "sand", "silt", "phh2o", "soc", "cec", "bdod", "nitrogen", "ocd", "ocs", "cfvo". depth Depth interval. One "0-5cm", "5-15cm", "15-30cm", "30-60cm", "60-100cm", "100-200cm". quantile Output quantile. One "mean" (default), "Q0.05", "Q0.5", "Q0.95", "uncertainty". baseurl Base URL SoilGrids COG endpoint. Default canonical ISRIC location; override local mirror. raw TRUE, returns integer raster value without scaling. Default FALSE (returns value conventional units).

title: Look up a SoilGrids 250m soil property at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_soilgrids
text: Numeric vector length nrow(coords). NA         outside SoilGrids footprint network errors.

title: Look up a SoilGrids 250m soil property at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_soilgrids
text: SoilGrids stores integer rasters scaled per property; helper applies canonical conversion factor returned value conventional soil units (%, pH, g/kg, cmol(c)/kg, g/cm^3).

title: Look up a SoilGrids 250m soil property at WGS84 coordinates — lookup_soilgrids
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Single point lookup_soilgrids(c(-43.0, -22.0),                   property = "phh2o",                   depth = "0-5cm",                   quantile = "mean")  # Vector + multiple properties coords <- rbind(c(-43.0, -22.0), c( -9.14, 38.72)) lookup_soilgrids(coords, "clay",  "0-5cm", "mean") lookup_soilgrids(coords, "phh2o", "0-5cm", "mean") } # }
