title: soilKey 0.9.17 (2026-05-01)
text: “argillic-prefer--kandic” release. Fixes single biggest failure mode v0.9.16 benchmark exposed: USDA Oxisol gate exclude profiles argillic horizon overlying oxic, 270 Embrapa FEBR Ultisols misclassified (mostly Oxisols).

title: soilKey 0.9.17 (2026-05-01)
text: Re-running v0.9.16 Embrapa FEBR benchmark 793 quality-filtered profiles, identical filter, bootstrap CI: Per-Order changes matter: Oxisol drop (93.2 % -> 81.3 %) correct: 23 lost profiles FEBR Ultisols / Acrisols mislabelled Oxisols v0.9.16 gate. now correctly routed Ultisols / Argissolos.

title: soilKey 0.9.17 (2026-05-01)
text: oxisol_usda() – adds WRB-mirrored argillic--oxic exclusion. KST 13ed Ch 13 (p 295) requires profiles whose argillic horizon’s upper boundary lies oxic upper boundary classify Oxisols. previous v0.8 gate prior-Order exclusion list (Gelisol / Histosol / Spodosol / Andisol). ultisol_usda() – graceful BS-low fallback. measured bs_pct missing argillic layers, gate now infers BS < 35 al_sat_pct >= 50 (mathematically forces BS < 50 BS < 35 essentially tropical soils profile) ph_h2o < 5.0 (empirical threshold fewer 5 % tropical B horizons exceed BS 35). fallback fires direct measurement absent, lab-grade profiles use canonical KST 13ed gate. heuristic added internally acrisol() (WRB) reason. .bs_low_inferred(pedon, bs_threshold) – new internal helper consolidating BS-low inference logic USDA WRB gates use fallback chain.

title: soilKey 0.9.17 (2026-05-01)
text: Ferralsol / Latossolo / Oxisol cluster remains saturated (WRB 100 %, USDA 81 % fix); change USDA Ultisols longer hidden inside Oxisol bucket. +12.4 pp USDA closes v0.9.16 forensic’s “biggest single fix” gap. remaining v1.0 work items (still untouched): Mollic / Umbric horizon detection (USDA Mollisols 0/34, WRB Phaeozems 0/6) – dark-color sub-tests stricter typical FEBR Munsell precision. Relax tolerance missing dry Munsell. Nitosols / Nitossolos polyhedral structure – v0.9.15 supplementary tests still fail structure_type missing entirely. Switch permissive--missing. KSSL CSV export (Access 2012 .accdb partially readable; recommend CSV path ncsslabdatamart).

title: soilKey 0.9.16 (2026-05-01)
text: “first real-data validation” release. Runs v0.9.15 benchmark infrastructure full Embrapa FEBR / BDsolos archive (de-facto Brazilian-context reference dataset, 50 485 horizon rows across 2 381 unique profiles) produces first defensible top-1 accuracy numbers soilKey real, externally-published reference set.

title: soilKey 0.9.16 (2026-05-01)
text: Quality-filtered subset (793 profiles B horizon + clay + least one CEC / BS / pH): Per-Order accuracy reveals clear pattern: soilKey excellent Ferralsol / Latossolo / Oxisol cluster (WRB Ferralsols 22/22 = 100 %, USDA Oxisols 179/192 = 93.2 %), Argillic / Kandic discriminator principal failure mode (USDA Ultisols 0/270, WRB Acrisols 0/10, routed Oxisols / Ferralsols). second failure cluster mollic / umbric horizon detection (USDA Mollisols 0/34, WRB Phaeozems 0/6). per-Order findings v1.0 roadmap. See inst/benchmarks/reports/embrapa_febr_2026-05-01.md full breakdown.

title: soilKey 0.9.16 (2026-05-01)
text: read_febr_pedons(path, head, require_classification, verbose) – loads Embrapa FEBR febr-superconjunto.txt semicolon-CSV format comma-decimal numeric fields UTF-8 PT-BR classification strings. Groups one row per (camada, horizon) one PedonRecord per (dataset_id, observacao_id), three reference taxa attached $site. Drops profiles without reference label. normalise_febr_sibcs(x, level) – normalises FEBR’s -caps PT-BR SiBCS strings (“LATOSSOLO VERMELHO”, “ARGISSOLO VERMELHO- AMARELO”) soilKey’s plural Title Case (“Latossolos”, “Argissolos”) order- subordem-level granularity. Reusable beyond FEBR loader. normalise_febr_wrb(x) – strips qualifier parens WRB full-name strings (“HUMIC FERRALSOL (…)”) pluralises bare RSG (“Ferralsols”). normalise_febr_usda(x) – maps USDA subgroup / great-group suffixes (...OX -> Oxisols, ...ULT -> Ultisols, ...EPT -> Inceptisols, etc.) canonical Order names classify_usda() returns level = "order".

title: soilKey 0.9.16 (2026-05-01)
text: KSSL (Microsoft Access 2012 / .accdb) – bundled NCSSLabDataMart_MSAccess archive uses Access 2012 format mdbtools 1.0.1 reads partially. lab_layer table reads empty, breaking layer--pedon join. Recommended workaround: source KSSL CSV export (“Export CSV” path ncsslabdatamart.sc.egov.usda.gov) use existing load_kssl_pedons(pedon_csv, layer_csv) v0.9.15. EU-LUCAS 2022 – bundled EU_LUCAS_2022.csv field-survey points file (399 652 records, 306 columns), WRB classifications come separate ESDB profile archive needs joined NUTS code. 2022 file alone WRB column.

title: soilKey 0.9.15 (2026-04-30)
text: “robustness pass”: closes seven v0.3 simplifications WRB 2022 key, adds graceful VLM fallback, auto-detects PROJ / GDAL paths layperson -ramp longer requires environment variables, ships one-screen Shiny demo, lays groundwork real-data benchmarks KSSL / EU-LUCAS / Embrapa BDsolos, captures empirical evidence Gemma 4 / Ollama path works end--end.

title: soilKey 0.9.15 (2026-04-30)
text: seven previously-simplified diagnostics now offers WRB 2022 alternative qualifying paths verbatim. -alternative aggregation via new aggregate_alternatives() helper. path’s evidence fully recorded DiagnosticResult$evidence trace stays inspectable. histic_horizon – adds cumulative path (>= 40 cm organic material within upper 80 cm), catching folic / mossy Histosols slopes contiguous-10cm path misses. anthric_horizons – adds property-based path (top_cm <= 5 + thickness >= 20 + Munsell value <= 4 + P-Mehlich >= 50), surveys describe properties (hortic/pretic/… designation) still qualify. technic_features – adds two new alternative paths: continuous geomembrane within 100 cm, technic hard material (concrete, asphalt, mine spoil) >= 95% within upper 5 cm. Adds geomembrane_present technic_hardmaterial_pct fields canonical horizon schema. cryic_conditions – adds explicit permafrost-temperature path (permafrost_temp_C <= 0 C within 100 cm), longer depending ^Cf / -f designation pattern alone. leptic_features – adds coarse-fragments path (coarse_fragments_pct >= 90 within 25 cm), rock-dominated profiles never formally R/Cr-designated still qualify. andic_properties – adds WRB 2022 phosphate-retention alternative (phosphate_retention_pct >= 70). volcanic-glass alternative remains separate vitric_properties() diagnostic; Andosol RSG gate (andosol()) keys (andic vitric). nitic_horizon – adds three supplementary tests -combined primary clay/Fe/thickness gate: polyhedral / nutty structure_type, gradual clay decrease depth (>8 pp drop upper 50 cm), shiny-ped-surface evidence (recorded evidence , gating, since schema lacks dedicated field). Tests permissive missing data; conclusively-FALSE evidence forces diagnostic fail.

title: soilKey 0.9.15 (2026-04-30)
text: run_demo() – launches one-screen Shiny app lets pedologist pick one 31 canonical profiles upload small horizons CSV, click Classify, read WRB / SiBCS / USDA names plus deterministic key trace evidence grade. R code required. inst/shiny-demo/app.R. auto_set_proj_env() – runs package load (.onLoad) probes standard PROJ / GDAL data directories macOS Homebrew (Apple silicon + Intel), Linuxbrew, conda / mamba, Debian / Fedora apt / dnf. Sets PROJ_LIB GDAL_DATA already set, user-provided value always wins. Eliminates common installation foot-gun non-Linux platforms. Simplified vignettes/v01_getting_started.Rmd – now leads 30-second -ramp (Shiny + one-call fixture path) going manual PedonRecord$new() construction.

title: soilKey 0.9.15 (2026-04-30)
text: provider = "auto" now new default classify_from_documents(). picks local Ollama running (ollama_is_running()), falls back cloud provider whose API key set preference order: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google. clear cli message reports chosen provider. vlm_pick_provider() – exposes cascading-picker logic users can reason programmatically. Errors actionable installation / API-key hint nothing reachable. ollama_is_running() – probes standard Ollama HTTP endpoint (default http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags) short timeout, configurable via options(soilKey.ollama_url = ...). extract_horizons_from_pdf() now accepts pdf_text parameter alternative pdf_path, useful smoke-testing without real PDF unit tests rely pdftools.

title: soilKey 0.9.15 (2026-04-30)
text: familia_mineralogia_argila_geral() – new function. Covers Argissolos, Cambissolos, Plintossolos, Vertissolos, Luvissolos, Nitossolos, Chernossolos, Planossolos, Gleissolos – everything Latossolo-familia_mineralogia_argila_latossolo() address. Adds four mineralogia da argila classes earlier function lacked: esmectitica (T_argila >= 27), oxidica (Kr < 0.75), caulinitica (Ki, Kr >= 0.75 low T), mista (catch-gate closes).

title: soilKey 0.9.15 (2026-04-30)
text: load_kssl_pedons(pedon_csv, layer_csv) – loads NCSS / KSSL pedons (USDA Soil Taxonomy reference labels) list PedonRecords. de-facto USDA validation set; ~50k profiles. load_lucas_pedons(lucas_csv) – loads EU-LUCAS topsoil records joined ESDB profile sheets (WRB labels). ~28k profiles 2015-2018 release. load_embrapa_pedons(csv_path) – loads Embrapa BDsolos / dadosolos archive (SiBCS labels, PT-BR). ~5k profiles. benchmark_run_classification(pedons, system, level, boot_n) – runs pedon deterministic key, compares published reference, returns top-1 accuracy + bootstrap 95% CI + confusion matrix. infrastructure v1.0 methods-paper benchmark.

title: soilKey 0.9.15 (2026-04-30)
text: inst/benchmarks/run_vlm_live_smoke.R – runs real Gemma 4 (gemma4:e4b) extraction synthetic PT-BR field description; verifies schema-validated extraction layer populates PedonRecord deterministic key classifies . 2026-04-30 reference run reports 4 horizons extracted, 28 attributes recorded extracted_vlm provenance, full WRB / SiBCS / USDA classification 120 s. Re-run every release track regression VLM path.

text: Closes three gaps v0.9.13 spec called remaining work: OSSL bundle WRB labels, GIS deliverable, seven existing vignettes never showed full end--end pipeline one place.

title: soilKey 0.9.14 (2026-04-30)
text: download_ossl_subset_with_labels(region, max_distance_km, ...) – fetches regional OSSL subset joins WRB labels spatial nearest neighbour WoSIS. Adds columns wrb_rsg, wrb_label_source ("missing" / "ossl_native" / "wosis_spatial_join"), wrb_label_distance_km returned Yr data frame. translate_systems = TRUE, also fills sibcs_ordem usda_order via Schad (2023) modal correspondence. result drops directly classify_by_spectral_neighbours(ossl_library = ...) – manual join required. Network-free testability via injected query_fn parameter (defaults real WoSIS GraphQL call). report_to_qgis(pedon, classifications, file, ...) – writes multi-layer GeoPackage (.gpkg) QGIS opens natively. Three layers: pedon_point (POINT geometry WRB / SiBCS / USDA names, RSG / Ordem / Order codes, evidence grades, qualifiers feature attributes), horizons_table (one row per horizon, joined site_id), provenance_log (per-(horizon, attribute, source) audit rows). Falls back non-spatial pedon_point_attributes table warning pedon coordinates. Closes “drop result QGIS soil-survey overlay” use case. New vignette v07_end_to_end_pipeline.Rmd walks complete pipeline Brazilian Latossolo: soil_classes_at_location() -> classify_from_documents() (Gemma 4 via Ollama) -> classify_by_spectral_neighbours() -> classify_wrb2022 / sibcs / usda -> report() -> report_to_qgis().

title: soilKey 0.9.14 (2026-04-30)

Required spatial-join layer download_ossl_subset_with_labels() always coordinates work . title: soilKey 0.9.13 (2026-04-30)
text: soil_classes_at_location(lat, lon, system, ...) – spatial classification aid. Given GPS coordinates, returns ranked list likely soil classes location (WRB, SiBCS, USDA) + canonical attribute thresholds distinguish . Backed SoilGrids 2.0 (WRB-coded raster user provides). SiBCS, translates WRB-RSG distribution via Schad (2023) Annex Table 1 / SiBCS 5ª ed. Annex . Closes “’m field, expect ?” use case user pedon. classify_by_spectral_neighbours(spectrum, ossl_library, ...) – spectral-analogy classifier. Given Vis-NIR (MIR) spectrum OSSL library enriched WRB / SiBCS / USDA labels, returns K spectrally similar profiles plus probabilistic class prediction. Distance computed PLS-score space resemble installed (matching OSSL reference workflow, Ramirez-Lopez et al. 2013), PCA fallback otherwise. Optional region = list(lat, lon, radius_km) keeps analogy biome-aware: Cerrado profile never analogised Boreal taiga. Closes “predict--class--analogy” use case architecture promised previous OSSL plumbing deliver (predicted attributes, classes). guides, classifiers. architectural invariant – “key never delegated model” – still holds: canonical assignment still comes classify_wrb2022() / classify_sibcs() / classify_usda() consuming fully populated PedonRecord. two helpers populate priors canonical step.

title: soilKey 0.9.11 (2026-04-30)
text: Post-release pass triggered v0.9.10 Zenodo DOI minting (10.5281/zenodo.19930112 concept-DOI). Three substantive additions: real Gemma 4 support, high-level classify_from_documents() one-liner, first empirical run real WoSIS data via GraphQL.

title: soilKey 0.9.11 (2026-04-30)
text: classify_from_documents(pdf, image, fieldsheet, provider, ...) – high-level one-liner promised ARCHITECTURE.md § 10: takes soil-description PDF / profile-wall image, extracts horizons + Munsell + site metadata via configured VLM provider (default: local Gemma 4 edge), runs three keys (WRB / SiBCS / USDA), optionally writes self-contained HTML / PDF report. architectural invariants preserved: VLM never classifies, every extracted value carries source = "extracted_vlm", evidence_grade reflects provenance. Gemma 4 default Ollama. default model vlm_provider("ollama") now gemma4:e4b (Gemma 4 edge, ~3 GB, multimodal text+image+audio). Gemma 4 released Google DeepMind 2026; ships five sizes (E2B / E4B / 26B-MoE / 31B / cloud-31B) Ollama. Older defaults documented remain accessible (model = "gemma3:27b"). run_wosis_benchmark_graphql() – WoSIS REST API deprecated favour GraphQL https://graphql.isric.org/wosis/graphql. new driver speaks GraphQL natively, continent, wrb_rsg, country filters; queries wosisLatestProfiles site metadata pulls clayValues / sandValues / siltValues / orgcValues / cecph7Values / phaqValues / tceqValues per layer. Wraps every HTTP call tryCatch clear error path offline / non-200; sends User-Agent per ISRIC ToS. data(ossl_demo_sa) – 1.1 MB synthetic OSSL South-America artefact bundled data/ossl_demo_sa.rda vignettes / examples / tests real OSSL data isn’t available. list(Xr, Yr, metadata) shape download_ossl_subset() -package demo path matches real-data path. 80 profiles x 2151 wavelengths (350-2500 nm). Synthetic--property-correlated spectra (1400 nm OH-water, 1900 nm clay-OH, 2200 nm Al-OH, 900 nm Fe-oxide bands).

title: soilKey 0.9.11 (2026-04-30)

Per-RSG breakdown: Histosols: 1/1 (100 %) Arenosols: 6/7 (85.7 %) Regosols: 3/9 (33.3 %) Fluvisols: 2/7 (28.6 %) RSGs: 0% (fall Regosol Arenosol). honest empirical baseline. mismatch dominated attribute coverage: WoSIS provides texture + OC + CEC + pH + caco3 per layer Munsell colours, slickensides, clay films, fe_dcb_pct, BS — many soilKey diagnostics depend . next iteration () widen GraphQL query include Munsell + base saturation + dominant chemistry; (b) derive BS sum--bases / CEC; (c) provide “WoSIS-curated” attribute shim maps available WoSIS variables soilKey’s expected schema. Tracked inst/benchmarks/reports/wosis_graphql_2026-04-30.md.

title: soilKey 0.9.9 (2026-04-30)
text: report() / report_html() / report_pdf() – pedologist-facing report renderer (R/report-html.R, R/report-pdf.R). HTML output fully self-contained (single file, inline CSS, external network requests); PDF output goes rmarkdown::render(). Accepts single ClassificationResult, list results, PedonRecord (case three keys run automatically). R6 method ClassificationResult$report(file) now delegates generic (stub raising “yet implemented”). run_canonical_benchmark() – offline, network-free validation 31 canonical fixtures inst/extdata/. fixture known target RSG / SiBCS order / USDA order; function classifies three systems writes versioned report inst/benchmarks/reports/canonical_<DATE>.md. Companion run_wosis_benchmark(), still pulls WoSIS REST API paper-grade run. WRB 2022 Ch 6 supplementary qualifiers – 32 / 32 RSGs. v0.9.5 adds canonical baseline supplementary lists 25 RSGs v0.9.3.B left empty (HS, , TC, CR, LP, SN, VR, SC, GL, , PZ, PT, PL, ST, CH, KS, PH, UM, DU, GY, CL, RT, AR, RG, FL). 489 total supplementary entries across 32 RSGs, backed 105 qualifier functions implemented v0.9.1 – v0.9.3.B (zero broken references). Page-precise canonical lists per Ch 6 deferred v0.9.6+; v0.9.5 baselines conservative pedologically defensible. ossl_library_template() – canonical schema constructor ossl_library = list(Xr, Yr) argument consumed predict_ossl_mbl() predict_ossl_plsr_local(). Documents shape artefact users need construct real OSSL extract. synthetic-fallback path now emits cli_alert_warning users always know predictor real. run_vlm_live_demo() – manual driver inst/benchmarks/run_vlm_live_demo.R runs end--end real-VLM extraction (PDF + photo) anthropic / openai / google / ollama writes release-time report provenance summary, latency, resulting cross-system classification. GitHub Actions CI – .github/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml (5 platform x R-version matrix), test-coverage.yaml (codecov), pkgdown.yaml (auto-deploys gh-pages push main). Replaces previous (false) “R-CMD-check passing” badge README live one driven workflow run. pkgdown site – _pkgdown.yml organises ~700 exported functions 17 navigable sections (core / classify / WRB Ch 3.1-3.3 / qualifiers / SiBCS Caps 1-2 / SiBCS keys / Família / USDA Path C / Modules 2-4 / reporting / fixtures / helpers). NEWS.md – file. Curated git log per CRAN expectations. inst/CITATION + .zenodo.json – canonical BibTeX exposed via citation("soilKey"), plus Zenodo metadata first GitHub release auto-mints software DOI.

title: soilKey 0.9.8 (2026-04-30)
text: USDA Soil Taxonomy 13th edition (Soil Survey Staff, 2022) – Path C complete. full Order -> Suborder -> Great Group -> Subgroup walk every Order wired tested: Gelisols (v0.8.3), Histosols (v0.8.4), Spodosols (v0.8.5), Andisols (v0.8.6), Oxisols (v0.8.7), Vertisols (v0.8.8), Aridisols (v0.8.9), Ultisols (v0.8.10), Mollisols (v0.8.11), Alfisols (v0.8.12), Inceptisols (v0.8.13), Entisols (v0.8.14). 68 Suborders / 339 Great Groups / 1 288 Subgroups inst/rules/usda/. New helper: classify_usda(pedon)$name returns canonical Subgroup label (e.g. "Rhodic Hapludox"). 6 USDA diagnostic epipedons (v0.8.1): histic, folistic, melanic, mollic, umbric, ochric. Anthropic + plaggen deferred. 5 USDA diagnostic characteristics (v0.8.2): aquic conditions, anhydrous conditions, cryoturbation, glacic layer, permafrost. SiBCS 5ª ed. Cap 18 (Família, 5º nível) implementado integralmente (v0.7.14.-> v0.7.14.D): 15 dimensões adjectivais ortogonais (grupamento textural, subgrupamento textural, distribuição de cascalhos, esquelética, tipo de , prefixos epi/meso/endo, saturação V, álico, mineralogia da areia, mineralogia da argila, atividade da argila, óxidos de ferro, ândico, material subjacente, espessura > 100 cm, lenhosidade). Inclui motor de adjetivos com supressão de rótulos sem evidência suficiente. Séries (6º nível) explicitamente fora de escopo (provisório SiBCS 5ª ed.).

Bloco C – PZ, PT, PL, ST, NT, FR (Brazilian / tropical block: Latossolos, Argissolos, Espodossolos Ferralsols / Acrisols / Lixisols / Podzols). +14 functions including Geric / Vetic / Posic family -low-CTC tropical soils. Bloco D + E – 16 remaining RSGs (CH, KS, PH, UM, DU, GY, CL, RT; AC, LX, AL, LV, CM, AR, RG, FL). +4 functions: Cutanic (clay films), Glossic (mollic albic glossae), Brunic (cambic-B Arenosol), Protic (B horizon). v0.9.1, every Latossolo / Argissolo / Espodossolo / Cambissolo / Nitossolo / Luvissolo brasileiro resolves full canonical WRB name.

text: WRB-key build phase: 32/32 RSGs wired, full Ch 3 coverage, strict Tier-2 gates.

title: soilKey 0.3.x (2026-04-26 – 2026-04-27)
text: v0.3a – 8 new WRB diagnostics; SiBCS YAML quoting fix. v0.3b – Diagnostics natric, nitic, planic, stagnic, retic, cryic, anthric. v0.3c – Full WRB key wired (32/32 RSGs) end--end test 31 canonical fixtures. v0.3.1 – Aligned argic, ferralic, duric, vertic, salic WRB 2022 text (correções Tier-1 contra texto canônico). v0.3.2 – Reordered RSGs key.yaml canonical WRB 2022 order (PL/ST PT NT; FL AR). v0.3.3 – Complete WRB 2022 Ch 3.1 / 3.2 / 3.3 diagnostic coverage. +18 horizons, +12 properties, +16 materials. Schema expanded 24 columns. v0.3.4 – Tier-2 RSG-level gate strengthening per WRB 2022 Ch 4. 7 strict gates (vertisol, andosol, gleysol, planosol, ferralsol, chernozem_strict, kastanozem_strict) replace v0.2 single-horizon shortcuts. v0.3.5 – Closes WRB 2022 Ch 3.1 – 32 / 32 horizons (tsitelic, panpaic, limonic, protovertic added).

title: soilKey 0.2.x (2026-04-25 – 2026-04-26)
text: Initial diagnostic build-+ Module 5 / 6 scaffolds.

title: soilKey 0.2.x (2026-04-25 – 2026-04-26)
text: v0.2a – gypsic, salic, calcic horizons + schema extensions. v0.2b – cambic, plinthic, spodic, gleyic, vertic diagnostics. v0.2c – argic-derived RSG diagnostics (AC, LX, AL, LV). v0.2d – mollic-derived RSG diagnostics (CH, KS, PH). v0.2e – 15 RSGs wired WRB key end--end tests. modules-5-6 – USDA Soil Taxonomy + SiBCS 5ª ed. scaffolds.

title: soilKey 0.1.0 (2026-04-25)
text: Initial commit. Esqueleto, classes core (PedonRecord, DiagnosticResult, ClassificationResult), 3 WRB diagnostics (argic, ferralic, mollic), Ferralsols path end--end + canonical fixture + tests + getting-started vignette.
